name: buckwheat
summary: Mechanism context: Rutin/quercetin polyphenol activity, endothelial nitric oxide signaling, α-glucosidase/α-amylase modulation. Safety: Food-level use is usually tolerated, but buckwheat allergy can be serious, including anaphylaxis; caution in known grain/pseudocereal allergy and when using concentrated extracts rather than food forms.. Interactions tracked: Potential interaction concern with antidiabetic medicines, antihypertensives/diuretics, immunosuppressants.

interactions: Potential interaction concern with antidiabetic medicines
use clinician review for high-dose extracts or chronic use.
preparation: Preparation varies by tradition and product form; food/tea use should not be treated as equivalent to concentrated extracts.
